attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT NSL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WFG.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
NSL.DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG AS SOL_DV_QUOTE_NUM_FLG,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY WFG.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM ORDER BY NSL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN NSL.DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG = '=' AND RANK_INDEX = 1 THEN 'N'
	  ELSE 'Y' END) AS DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORD_LINE_QUOTE WFG 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSL
ON (WFG.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM = NSL.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM
    AND WFG.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM IS NOT NULL
	AND NSL.SS_CODE NOT IN ('OPL'))

SELECT 
WSLQ.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
WSLQ.CREATE_DTM,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS UPDATE_DTM
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORD_LINE_QUOTE WSLQ
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SALES_ORD_LINE_QUOTE_FLG WSQF
WHERE COALESCE(WSLQ.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,'-X+' ) = WSQF.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WSLQ.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM ORDER BY WSLQ.CREATE_DTM ASC )=1

SELECT 
WSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
WSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
WSOLV.SS_CODE,
WSOLV.BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,
WSOLV.BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT,
WSOLV.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
WSOLV.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ,
WSOLV.START_SSP_DATE ,
WSOLV.START_TV_DTM ,
WSOLV.END_SSP_DATE ,
WSOLV.END_TV_DTM ,
WSOLV.DISPATCH_DTM,
WSOLV.PRINT_QUEUE_NAME,
WSOLV.CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME,
WSOLV.DISPATCH_STATUS_CD,
WSOLV.EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
WSOLV.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WSOLV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
WSOLV.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WSOLV.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM ,
WSOLV.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM , 
WSOLV.DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG ,
WSOLV.GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /*Release8.0*/
WSOLV.ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY , /*Release8.0*/
WSOLV.SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /*Release8.0*/
WSOLV.ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM ,  /*Release8.0*/  
WSOLV.ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD, /*Release8.0*/
WSOLV.SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID, /*Release8.0*/
WSOLV.BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,  /*Release8.0 AM Changes*/
WSOLV.CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,   /*Release8.0 AM Changes*/
WSOLV.CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM ,   /* ICW */
WSOLV.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD  ,   /* ICW */
WSOLV.SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_EMAIL_CMT ,   /* ICW */
WSOLV.SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD ,  /* ICW */
WSOLV.DV_BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DT ,
WSOLV.SOL_TAA_FLG,
WSOLV.PRODUCT_CONFIG_CHECKED_FLG, /*CDO SALES ORDERS LINE ENHANCEMENTS (QUICK WIN)*/
WSOLV.EARLY_BUILD_ROLE,
WSOLV.RU_EARLY_BUILD_START_DT,
WSOLV.CONTRACT_DURATION_ROLE, /* As a part of ERP for Revenue Attribution for Q3FY13 */
WSOLV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT, /* As a part of ERP for Revenue Attribution for Q3FY13 */
WSOLV.SVC_CONTRACT_EFFECT_DAYS_CNT, /*Services SCM SALES ORDER LINE ENHANCEMENTS(QUICK WIN)*/
WSOLV.DEFAULT_FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,
WSOLV.DEFAULT_FRGHT_PYMNT_METHOD_CD,
WSOLV.DEFAULT_FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD,
WSOLV.INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT,
WSOLV.RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY/* Added as part of SALES_ORDER changes,August release,2014*/,
WSOLV.EXTRNL_PO_LN_NUM_NAME_NUM,/*ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGES Q2FY15 */
WSOLV.PAK_CD
FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1 WSOLV
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  NSOLVT 
WHERE NSOLVT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = WSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)
